zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Mohun於大約1352年出生在英國薩默塞特登斯特時，她的父親John de Mohun 2nd Baron33歲，母親Joan de Burghersh26歲。她於1369年6月13日與John le Strange 6th Lord Strange of Knockin在英國史洛普爾可諾金 在 奧斯維斯崔結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1400年9月20日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾可諾金 在 奧斯維斯崔享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Mohun于大约1352年出生在英国薩默塞特登斯特时，她的父亲John de Mohun 2nd Baron33岁，母亲Joan de Burghersh26岁。她于1369年6月13日与John le Strange 6th Lord Strange of Knockin在英国史洛普爾可諾金 在 奧斯維斯崔结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1400年9月20日在英国英格兰史洛普爾可諾金 在 奧斯維斯崔享年49岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Mohun was born about 1352, in Dunster, Somerset, England, her father, John de Mohun 2nd Baron, was 33 and her mother, Joan de Burghersh, was 26. She married John le Strange 6th Lord Strange of Knockin on 13 June 1369, in Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 20 September 1400, in Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England: Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Mohun est née environ 1352, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John de Mohun 2nd Baron, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan de Burghersh, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John le Strange 6th Lord Strange of Knockin le 13 juin 1369, à Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 septembre 1400, à Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

Juni 1369 in Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England John le Strange 6th Lord Strange of Knockin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Mohun è nata il circa 1352 nel Dunster, Somerset, England, sua padre, John de Mohun 2nd Baron, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Joan de Burghersh, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato John le Strange 6th Lord Strange of Knockin il 13 giugno 1369, nel Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 20 settembre 1400, nel Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Mohunが約1352年にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父John de Mohun 2nd Baronは33歳，母Joan de Burghershは26歳であった。1369年6月13日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアノクイン イン オスウエストリーでJohn le Strange 6th Lord Strange of Knockinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1400年9月20日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアノクイン イン オスウエストリーで49歳で死去した。

ko.Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 노킨 인 오스w스트리
ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Mohun(이)가 대략 1352년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Mohun 2nd Baron(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Burghersh(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1369년 6월 13일 영국 슈럽실르 노킨 인 오스w스트리에서 John le Strange 6th Lord Strange of Knockin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1400년 9월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 노킨 인 오스w스트리에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Mohun nasceu aproximadamente 1352, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Mohun 2nd Baron, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Burghersh, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John le Strange 6th Lord Strange of Knockin em 13 de junho de 1369, em Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1400, em Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos.

ru.Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England: ноккин ин освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Mohun родилась около 1352 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Mohun 2nd Baron было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Burghersh, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John le Strange 6th Lord Strange of Knockin 13 июня 1369 г. в местности ноккин ин освестри, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 20 сентября 1400 г. в местности ноккин ин освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.
